svg.title: How India's internet time is split
svg.desc: How India's internet time is split. Source: NCAER IHDS Wave 3 (2024-25). Self-reported usage shares; actual minutes may differ. The 'Entertainment & Social Media' category combines NCAER's entertainment/news/video share with social-media use reported by ASER. Remaining slices are illustrative allocations.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: How India's internet time is split

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: NCAER IHDS Wave 3 (2024-25) — Self-reported usage shares; actual minutes may differ. The 'Entertainment & Social Media' category combines NCAER's entertainment/news/video share with social-media use reported by ASER. Remaining slices are illustrative allocations.
